videos.headline: Tai Lavatai's 45-yard pass sets up a Navy touchdown
videos.description: Tai Lavatai connects with Anton Hall Jr. for a 45-yard gain to set up a Navy touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tai Lavatai's 45-yard pass sets up a Navy touchdown) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tai Lavatai finds Nathan Kent to set up a Camari Williams TD
videos.description: Tai Lavatai steps up and hits Nathan Kent for a 35-yard gain before hitting Camari Williams in the end zone for a Navy touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tai Lavatai finds Nathan Kent to set up a Camari Williams TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Referee gets tackled in Navy-Wagner
videos.description: The back umpire finds himself in the middle of a pile during a Wagner drive against Navy.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Referee gets tackled in Navy-Wagner) 2023/09/09 ESHEET
